mapper.insert: insert into ai_conversation(user_id, title, message_count, last_message_at, deleted, created_at, updated_at) values(#{userId}, #{title}, #{messageCount}, #{lastMessageAt}, #{deleted}, now(), now())
mapper.select: select * from ai_conversation where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} and deleted = 0 limit 1
select * from ai_conversation where user_id = #{userId} and deleted = 0 order by case when last_message_at is null then 1 else 0 end asc, last_message_at desc, id desc
mapper.update: update ai_conversation set title = #{title}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} and deleted = 0
update ai_conversation set deleted = 1, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} and deleted = 0
update ai_conversation set message_count = message_count + #{delta}, last_message_at = #{lastMessageAt}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} and deleted = 0
